command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Check OpenClaw state.sqlite for the spam (main runtime DB) ==="
which sqlite3 2>/dev/null || (apt-get install -y sqlite3 -q 2>&1 | tail -1)
sqlite3 /home/jose/.openclaw/state/openclaw.sqlite ".tables" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- all text content in state DB ---"
sqlite3 /home/jose/.openclaw/state/openclaw.sqlite "SELECT * FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "--- strings search in state sqlite ---"
strings /home/jose/.openclaw/state/openclaw.sqlite 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "A_ToolsX|join our channel|must join|t.me/A_" | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== What does Remy's Telegram spam ACTUALLY look like in Remy log? ==="
grep -iE "A_ToolsX|join our channel|must join|ToolsX" /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5 | cut -c1-200
find /tmp/openclaw/ -name "*.log" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do
  MATCH=$(grep -iE "A_ToolsX|join our channel" "$f" 2>/dev/null | tail -2)
  [ -n "$MATCH" ] && echo "--- $f ---" && echo "$MATCH"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Is Sakura's send_message tool calling Remy? Check what Sakura sent ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "grep -iE 'send_message|remy|telegram.*send|tool_use' /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10 | cut -c1-200"

echo ""
echo "=== Check what Remy's OpenClaw log shows for the 11:32 timeframe ==="
grep "11:32\|23:32" /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|message|send|remy" | tail -10 | cut -c1-200
REMOTE
